zh.lifeSummary: Mary Weaman和John Jennens至少有1個兒子。

nameMeanings.name: Weaman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Johan, Nels.
English (Kent, Middlesex, and Berskhire): variant of   Wainman  .
Swedish: ornamental or habitational name formed with an unexplained first element (probably from placenames beginning with Venn- or Vänn-, of many possible origins) + man ‘man’.

variants.name: Wainman
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): occupational name from Middle English wain-man ‘wagon-driver’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .
